name: Phantom
comment: PHANTOM: PHANTOM brings arena-level output capabilities with powerful FX that are sure to excite. At 24,000 lumens, it features nineteen (19), independently controllable, 60W RGBL LEDs with each 60W pixel surrounded by 4 RGB GLODOT pixels (76 total) that can create a soft backlit glow for each lens cell or menacing, direct-view looks with powerful pixel effects that can be further intensified by the rotating lens effect for mid-air and surface looks. An extensive zoom range of 4.5 - 60deg creates an intense large-aperture beam to an ultra-wide wash. A native ≥80 CRI and impressive TM-30 ratings give truetone whites and deeply saturated colors. Choose from a wealth of on-board pixel effects along with flexible control options via DMX, Art-Net, and sACN with split address/universe capabilities to separate pixel mapping and DMX parameters for effortless control at your ideal channel footprint.

capabilities.comment: Rotate CW S > F - Rotate CW
Rotate CCW S > F - Rotate CCW
Pulse Strobe S > F - Strobe Pulse Random
Strobe Random S > F - Strobe Random
Pulse Strobe S > F - Strobe Pulse Random
Strobe Random S > F - Strobe Random
Rotate CW S > F - Rotate CW
Rotate CCW S > F - Rotate CCW
Pulse Strobe S > F - Strobe Pulse Random
Strobe Random S > F - Strobe Random
